definition: generic concept of forecasting preventive maintenance needs of an item in service by mathematical or statistical methods, based on condition monitoring about physical state or operational parameter

definition_ml.en: generic concept of forecasting preventive maintenance needs of an item in service by mathematical or statistical methods, based on condition monitoring about physical state or operational parameter

note:
1  May be conducted automatically during operation or at planned time intervals

2 Result may lead to an unscheduled maintenance, whereas a scheduled maintenance is carried in accordance with a s specified time schedule

note_ml.en:
1  May be conducted automatically during operation or at planned time intervals

2 Result may lead to an unscheduled maintenance, whereas a scheduled maintenance is carried in accordance with a s specified time schedule
